category_sources: source_facts.description describes libplist as a library for Apple binary and XML property lists.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies libplist; source_facts.repo places it under the official libimobiledevice project.
docs_sources: Official libimobiledevice documentation page links to the latest libplist API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libimobiledevice/libplist, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Apple binary and XML property list support; official libplist API docs document the library.
